public sealed class PlcSemanticGraphQueries
{
    private readonly SemanticPlcGraph graph;

    public PlcSemanticGraphQueries(SemanticPlcGraph graph)
    {
        this.graph = graph ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(graph));
    }

    public IReadOnlyList<SemanticGraphNode> FindBlocksCalling(string blockName)
    {
        var targetId = $"block:{blockName}";
        return graph.Edges
            .Where(edge => edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.Calls && edge.ToNodeId == targetId)
            .Select(edge => graph.GetNode(edge.FromNodeId))
            .Where(IsBlockNode)
            .DistinctById()
            .OrderBy(node => node.Name, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ToArray();
    }

    public IReadOnlyList<SemanticGraphNode> FindBlocksReading(string variableName)
    {
        return FindBlocksUsing($"symbol:{variableName}", SemanticRelationshipType.Reads);
    }

    public IReadOnlyList<SemanticGraphNode> FindBlocksWriting(string variableName)
    {
        return FindBlocksUsing($"symbol:{variableName}", SemanticRelationshipType.Writes);
    }

    public IReadOnlyList<SemanticGraphNode> FindDbMembersUsed()
    {
        var memberIds = new HashSet<string>(
            graph.Edges
                .Where(edge => edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.Reads || edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.Writes)
                .Select(edge => edge.ToNodeId),
            StringComparer.Ordinal);

        return graph.Nodes
            .Where(node => node.Kind == SemanticNodeKind.DataBlockMember && memberIds.Contains(node.Id))
            .OrderBy(node => node.Name, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ToArray();
    }

    public IReadOnlyList<PlcCallGraphEdge> BuildCallGraph()
    {
        return graph.Edges
            .Where(edge => edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.Calls)
            .Select(edge => new PlcCallGraphEdge(graph.GetNode(edge.FromNodeId), graph.GetNode(edge.ToNodeId), edge))
            .Where(edge => IsBlockNode(edge.Caller))
            .OrderBy(edge => edge.Caller.Name, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ThenBy(edge => edge.Callee.Name, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ToArray();
    }

    public IReadOnlyList<PlcDependencyGraphEdge> BuildDependencyGraph()
    {
        return graph.Edges
            .Where(edge =>
                edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.Calls ||
                edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.Reads ||
                edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.Writes ||
                edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.HasType ||
                edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.InstanceOf ||
                edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.ConnectedTo)
            .Select(edge => new PlcDependencyGraphEdge(graph.GetNode(edge.FromNodeId), graph.GetNode(edge.ToNodeId), edge.Type, edge))
            .OrderBy(edge => edge.Source.Name, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ThenBy(edge => edge.Relationship, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ThenBy(edge => edge.Target.Name, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ToArray();
    }

    private IReadOnlyList<SemanticGraphNode> FindBlocksUsing(string targetId, string relationship)
    {
        return graph.Edges
            .Where(edge => edge.Type == relationship && edge.ToNodeId == targetId)
            .Select(edge => graph.GetNode(edge.FromNodeId))
            .Where(IsBlockNode)
            .DistinctById()
            .OrderBy(node => node.Name, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ToArray();
    }

    private static bool IsBlockNode(SemanticGraphNode node)
    {
        return node.Kind == SemanticNodeKind.OrganizationBlock ||
            node.Kind == SemanticNodeKind.FunctionBlock ||
            node.Kind == SemanticNodeKind.Function;
    }
}

public sealed class PlcCallGraphEdge
{
    public PlcCallGraphEdge(SemanticGraphNode caller, SemanticGraphNode callee, SemanticGraphEdge edge)
    {
        Caller = caller;
        Callee = callee;
        Edge = edge;
    }

    public SemanticGraphNode Caller { get; }

    public SemanticGraphNode Callee { get; }

    public SemanticGraphEdge Edge { get; }
}

public sealed class PlcDependencyGraphEdge
{
    public PlcDependencyGraphEdge(SemanticGraphNode source, SemanticGraphNode target, string relationship, SemanticGraphEdge edge)
    {
        Source = source;
        Target = target;
        Relationship = relationship;
        Edge = edge;
    }

    public SemanticGraphNode Source { get; }

    public SemanticGraphNode Target { get; }

    public string Relationship { get; }

    public SemanticGraphEdge Edge { get; }
}

public static class PlcSemanticGraphSqliteSchema
{
    public const string CreateScript = """
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS graph_nodes (
            id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
            kind TEXT NOT NULL,
            name TEXT NOT NULL
        );

        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS graph_node_properties (
            node_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            name TEXT NOT NULL,
            value TEXT NOT NULL,
            PRIMARY KEY (node_id, name),
            FOREIGN KEY (node_id) REFERENCES graph_nodes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
        );

        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS graph_edges (
            id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
            from_node_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            to_node_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            type TEXT NOT NULL,
            FOREIGN KEY (from_node_id) REFERENCES graph_nodes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            FOREIGN KEY (to_node_id) REFERENCES graph_nodes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
        );


</details>

<details><summary>Thinking</summary>

`PlcSemanticGraphQueries` in the reference is an in-memory graph query helper (FindBlocksCalling, FindBlocksReading, BuildCallGraph...) — not the get_block/get_network/search MCP tools. It's not what this step needs; the MCP tools are new code (the reference has no MCP server). So the query helpers are new code in KnowledgeTools.cs, working over SQL (stateless per call — the MCP server doesn't hold the graph in memory; each call opens SQLite read-only).

Design (keep stupidly simple, mirrors the agent guide SQL):

**get_block** `{ dbPath, block }` →
```json
{
  "block": { "id", "kind", "name", "sourceFile", "folderPath" },
  "networks": [ { "index", "compileUnitId", "title", "language", "logicStatements" (null when absent) } ]
}
```
SQL 1: block node + properties:
```sql
SELECT n.id, n.kind, n.name,
  (SELECT value FROM graph_node_properties WHERE node_id=n.id AND name='sourceFile') ...
```
Simpler: two small queries. Or one query for node, one for properties. Keep it readable.

SQL for networks (from the guide):
```sql
SELECT network.id, idx.value, title.value, lang.value, cu.value, logic.value
FROM graph_edges e
JOIN graph_nodes network ON network.id = e.to_node_id
LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties idx ON idx.node_id = network.id AND idx.name = 'networkIndex'
LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties title ON title.node_id = network.id AND title.name = 'title'
LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties lang ON lang.node_id = network.id AND lang.name = 'language'
LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties cu ON cu.node_id = network.id AND cu.name = 'compileUnitId'
LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties logic ON logic.node_id = network.id AND logic.name = 'logicStatements'
WHERE e.type = 'CONTAINS' AND e.from_node_id = @blockId AND network.kind = 'Network'
ORDER BY CAST(idx.value AS INTEGER);
```

**get_network** `{ dbPath, block, networkIndex }` → same row as above plus:
- reads: `SELECT n.name FROM graph_edges e JOIN graph_nodes n ON n.id = e.to_node_id WHERE e.from_node_id = @networkId AND e.type = 'READS' ORDER BY n.name`
- writes: same with 'WRITES'
- calls: `SELECT n.name, n.kind FROM graph_edges e JOIN graph_nodes n ON n.id = e.to_node_id WHERE e.from_node_id = @networkId AND e.type = 'CALLS'` — wait, do network-level CALLS edges exist? Looking at the importer: for calls, edges added: `reference.From → instructionId` CONTAINS, `instructionId → calleeId` CALLS, `blockId → calleeId` CALLS. So network→callee CALLS edges don't exist directly; network→instruction CONTAINS, instruction→callee CALLS. So per-network calls: 
```sql
SELECT callee.name, callee.kind FROM graph_edges ce
JOIN graph_nodes instr ON instr.id = ce.to_node_id AND ce.type = 'CONTAINS' AND ce.from_node_id = @networkId
JOIN graph_edges call ON call.from_node_id = instr.id AND call.type = 'CALLS'
JOIN graph_nodes callee ON callee.id = call.to_node_id
```

**search** `{ dbPath, text, kind?, maxRows? }` →
```json
{ "matches": [ { "id", "kind", "name", "matchedIn": "name"|"title"|"logicStatements", "snippet" } ] }
```
SQL:
```sql
SELECT id, kind, name, 'name' AS matchedIn, NULL AS snippet FROM graph_nodes WHERE name LIKE @pattern [AND kind = @kind]
UNION ALL
SELECT n.id, n.kind, n.name, p.name, p.value FROM graph_nodes n JOIN graph_node_properties p ON p.node_id = n.id AND p.name IN ('title','logicStatements') WHERE p.value LIKE @pattern [AND n.kind = @kind]
ORDER BY kind, id
LIMIT @limit
```
Snippet: truncate to 200 chars in C#. LIKE pattern: `%` + escaped text + `%` with ESCAPE '\'.

Hmm wait — escaping: user text might contain `%`, `_`, `\`. Escape with backslash: pattern = "%" + text.Replace("\\","\\\\").Replace("%","\\%").Replace("_","\\_") + "%", and SQL `LIKE @pattern ESCAPE '\'`.

Error codes: BLOCK_NOT_FOUND, NETWORK_NOT_FOUND, DB_NOT_FOUND (exists). Also validate networkIndex > 0.

Implementation location: KnowledgeTools.cs is the tool surface; I'll add a small private helper class for the graph queries? Or inline in KnowledgeTools. Given the file is 210 lines and would roughly double, I could create `Tools/GraphQueryHelpers.cs`... The repo style: Graph/, Import/, Parsing/, Tools/ folders. A separate `Graph/KnowledgeQueries.cs` might be cleaner. Hmm — keep it simple: all in KnowledgeTools.cs as private methods, consistent with the existing single-class design. 210 → ~450 lines is still fine.

Actually, let me reconsider: KnowledgeTools has RunQuery returning columns/rows. The new tools need typed results — separate code paths but can share the "open read-only connection" part. I'll write a small `OpenReadOnly(dbPath)` helper.

Now the MCP tool signatures:

```csharp
[McpServerTool(Name = "get_block")]
[Description("Get a program block (OB/FB/FC) with its networks: index, title, language and translated SCL-like logicStatements (read-only).")]
public CallToolResult GetBlock(
    [Description("Path to the plc-knowledge.db file.")] string dbPath,
    [Description("Block name, e.g. 'Main' or 'FC_LAD_SimulateCylinder_Call'.")] string block)

[McpServerTool(Name = "get_network")]
[Description("Get one network of a block: title, language, logicStatements, symbols read/written and blocks called (read-only).")]
public CallToolResult GetNetwork(
    [Description("Path to the plc-knowledge.db file.")] string dbPath,
    [Description("Block name.")] string block,
    [Description("1-based network index.")] int networkIndex)

[McpServerTool(Name = "search")]
[Description("Case-insensitive substring search over node names and network title/logicStatements text (read-only).")]
public CallToolResult Search(
    [Description("Path to the plc-knowledge.db file.")] string dbPath,
    [Description("Substring to find (case-insensitive).")] string text,
    [Description("Optional node-kind filter, e.g. 'Network', 'OB', 'Variable'.")] string? kind = null,
    [Description("Maximum matches (default 50, hard cap 200).")] int? maxRows = null)
```

Result shapes — anonymous objects serialized via ToolJson.Ok (check how ToolJson serializes — probably System.Text.Json). Let me check ToolJson.

Also need to check SemanticNodeKind constants used: "OB","FB","FC" kinds in graph are SemanticNodeKind.OrganizationBlock etc. — what are the string values? From SchemaVocabulary they map to 'OB','FB','FC'. In SQL I'll use literal 'OB','FB','FC' (same as guide SQL does).

Let me check ToolJson and then write the tools. Also check how the existing tests invoke tools (ToolResults.cs helper) to design testable outputs.

1	using System.Text.Json;
2	using System.Text.Json.Serialization;
3	using ModelContextProtocol.Protocol;

5	namespace Mcp.Knowledge.Tools;
6	
7	/// <summary>
8	/// Tool-result envelope, mirroring Mcp.Engineering's convention: failures are isError=true
9	/// results with a structured { code, message, remediation } payload; protocol errors stay protocol-level.
10	/// </summary>
11	internal static class ToolJson
12	{
13	    private static readonly JsonSerializerOptions Json = new()
14	    {
15	        PropertyNamingPolicy = JsonNamingPolicy.CamelCase,
16	        DefaultIgnoreCondition = JsonIgnoreCondition.WhenWritingNull,
17	    };

19	    public static CallToolResult Ok(object payload) => new()
20	    {
21	        IsError = false,
22	        Content = new List<ContentBlock>
23	        {
24	            new TextContentBlock { Text = JsonSerializer.Serialize(payload, Json) },

29	    {
30	        IsError = true,
31	        Content = new List<ContentBlock>
32	        {
33	            new TextContentBlock

Clear. Now write the three tools. I'll append them to KnowledgeTools.cs. Design finalized as above. Note `DefaultIgnoreCondition.WhenWritingNull` — null logicStatements will be omitted from JSON; good.

Implementation details:

```csharp
[McpServerTool(Name = "get_block")]
public CallToolResult GetBlock(string dbPath, string block)
    => Invoke(() => BlockDetail(dbPath, block));

[McpServerTool(Name = "get_network")]
public CallToolResult GetNetwork(string dbPath, string block, int networkIndex)
    => Invoke(() => NetworkDetail(dbPath, block, networkIndex));

[McpServerTool(Name = "search")]
public CallToolResult Search(string dbPath, string text, string? kind = null, int? maxRows = null)
    => Invoke(() => SearchGraph(dbPath, text, kind, maxRows));
```

Helpers:

```csharp
private const int DefaultSearchMaxRows = 50;
private const int HardSearchMaxRows = 200;

private static SqliteConnection OpenReadOnly(string dbPath)
{
    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(dbPath) || !File.Exists(dbPath))
    {
        throw new KnowledgeToolException("DB_NOT_FOUND", $"Database '{dbPath}' was not found.", "Run ingest_source first, or check the dbPath.");
    }

    SqliteSemanticGraphStore.EnsureSqliteInitialized();
    var connectionString = new SqliteConnectionStringBuilder { DataSource = dbPath, Mode = SqliteOpenMode.ReadOnly }.ToString();
    var connection = new SqliteConnection(connectionString);
    connection.Open();
    return connection;
}
```

Block lookup:
```csharp
private static (string Id, string Kind, string Name) FindBlockNode(SqliteConnection connection, string block)
{
    // exact name match (case-insensitive), program blocks only
    using var command = connection.CreateCommand();
    command.CommandText = """
        SELECT id, kind, name FROM graph_nodes
        WHERE name = @name COLLATE NOCASE AND kind IN ('OB', 'FB', 'FC')
        ORDER BY LENGTH(id) LIMIT 1;
        """;
    command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@name", block);
    using var reader = command.ExecuteReader();
    if (!reader.Read()) throw new KnowledgeToolException("BLOCK_NOT_FOUND", $"Block '{block}' was not found.", "Check the block name; list blocks via the query tool: SELECT id, kind, name FROM graph_nodes WHERE kind IN ('OB','FB','FC').");
    return (reader.GetString(0), reader.GetString(1), reader.GetString(2));
}
```

Hmm ORDER BY LENGTH(id)? If both 'Main' and 'MAIN' exist... overthinking. Just LIMIT 1. Actually deterministic order: ORDER BY id. Fine.

Wait — one concern: `name = @name COLLATE NOCASE` — applies NOCASE to the comparison; OK.

Networks query (shared by get_block/get_network):

```csharp
private static List<NetworkRow> ReadNetworks(SqliteConnection connection, string blockId)
{
    using var command = connection.CreateCommand();
    command.CommandText = """
        SELECT
          network.id,
          idx.value AS networkIndex,
          cu.value AS compileUnitId,
          title.value AS title,
          lang.value AS language,
          logic.value AS logicStatements
        FROM graph_edges e
        JOIN graph_nodes network ON network.id = e.to_node_id AND network.kind = 'Network'
        LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties idx ON idx.node_id = network.id AND idx.name = 'networkIndex'
        LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties cu ON cu.node_id = network.id AND cu.name = 'compileUnitId'
        LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties title ON title.node_id = network.id AND title.name = 'title'
        LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties lang ON lang.node_id = network.id AND lang.name = 'language'
        LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties logic ON logic.node_id = network.id AND logic.name = 'logicStatements'
        WHERE e.type = 'CONTAINS' AND e.from_node_id = @blockId
        ORDER BY CAST(idx.value AS INTEGER);
        """;
    ...
}
```

NetworkRow as a small private record or tuple list. Result anonymous objects:

get_block result:
```csharp
return new
{
    block = new { id, kind, name, sourceFile, folderPath },
    networks = networks.Select(n => new { index = n.Index, compileUnitId = n.CompileUnitId, title = n.Title, language = n.Language, logicStatements = n.LogicStatements }),
};
```
index: parse idx int for JSON number. networkIndex stored as string; parse int.TryParse → int? Keep as string? The DB stores strings. For JSON, nicer as number. I'll parse to int (fallback 0? fallback null). Keep simple: int.TryParse → value or null. Since WhenWritingNull, omitted if unparseable.

```csharp
{
    block = new { id, kind, name },
    network = new { id, index, compileUnitId, title, language, logicStatements, reads = [...], writes = [...], calls = [ { name, kind } ] },
};
```

reads/writes:
```sql
SELECT n.name FROM graph_edges e JOIN graph_nodes n ON n.id = e.to_node_id
WHERE e.from_node_id = @networkId AND e.type = 'READS' ORDER BY n.name;
```

calls per network:
```sql
SELECT callee.name, callee.kind FROM graph_edges contains
JOIN graph_nodes instr ON instr.id = contains.to_node_id AND instr.kind = 'Instruction'
JOIN graph_edges calls ON calls.from_node_id = instr.id AND calls.type = 'CALLS'
JOIN graph_nodes callee ON callee.id = calls.to_node_id
WHERE contains.type = 'CONTAINS' AND contains.from_node_id = @networkId
ORDER BY callee.name;
```

get_network when index not found → NETWORK_NOT_FOUND listing available indexes.

search:
```csharp
private static object SearchGraph(string dbPath, string text, string? kind, int? maxRows)
{
    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(text)) throw new KnowledgeToolException("QUERY_REJECTED"...)? 
```
Hmm — better code: "SEARCH_TEXT_REQUIRED"? Keep the convention simple: reuse QUERY_REJECTED? That's for SQL. New code "SEARCH_TEXT_REQUIRED" with remediation. OK.

```csharp
    var limit = maxRows is null ? DefaultSearchMaxRows : Math.Clamp(maxRows.Value, 1, HardSearchMaxRows);
    var escaped = text.Replace("\\", "\\\\").Replace("%", "\\%").Replace("_", "\\_");
    var pattern = "%" + escaped + "%";
    using var connection = OpenReadOnly(dbPath);
    using var command = connection.CreateCommand();
    command.CommandText = """
        SELECT id, kind, name, 'name' AS matchedIn, NULL AS snippet
        FROM graph_nodes
        WHERE name LIKE @pattern ESCAPE '\' {kindFilter}
        UNION ALL
        SELECT n.id, n.kind, n.name, p.name AS matchedIn, p.value AS snippet
        FROM graph_nodes n
        JOIN graph_node_properties p ON p.node_id = n.id AND p.name IN ('title', 'logicStatements')
        WHERE p.value LIKE @pattern ESCAPE '\' {kindFilterN}
        ORDER BY kind, id
        LIMIT @limit;
        """;
```
SQLite UNION ALL + ORDER BY at end applies to whole union. kind filter: if kind != null, add `AND kind = @kind` in first and `AND n.kind = @kind` in second. Build the SQL string conditionally.

Snippet truncation: logicStatements can be huge — truncate to 300 chars + "…". Actually for 'title' no truncation needed but same cap is fine.

matchedIn values: 'name', 'title', 'logicStatements'.

Result: `{ text, kind (null when not passed), matches: [...], truncated }` — truncated when rows.Count == limit? Using LIMIT @limit we can't distinguish exactly-limit vs cut. Use the RunQuery trick: fetch limit+1? Simpler: LIMIT @limit + 1 in SQL? Then truncated = rows.Count > limit, trim. Let me do: LIMIT @limit + 1... in SQL param: `LIMIT @limitPlusOne`. Fine.

Also dedupe: a network whose name matches text AND logic matches → two rows. Acceptable (matchedIn differs).

328	    public static void ImportDbXml(string xml, string sourceFile, string sourcePath, SemanticPlcGraph graph)
329	    {
330	        if (xml == null)
331	        {
332	            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(xml));
333	        }
334	
335	        if (graph == null)
336	        {
337	            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(graph));
338	        }
339	
340	        XDocument document;
341	        try
342	        {
343	            document = XDocument.Parse(xml);
344	        }
345	        catch (XmlException)
346	        {
347	            return;
348	        }
349

```csharp
    [McpServerTool(Name = "get_block")]
    [Description("Get a program block (OB/FB/FC) with its networks: index, title, language and translated SCL-like logicStatements (read-only).")]
    public CallToolResult GetBlock(
        [Description("Path to the plc-knowledge.db file.")] string dbPath,
        [Description("Block name, e.g. 'Main'.")] string block)
        => Invoke(() => BlockDetail(dbPath, block));

    [McpServerTool(Name = "get_network")]
    [Description("Get one network of a program block: title, language, logicStatements, symbols read/written and blocks called (read-only).")]
    public CallToolResult GetNetwork(
        [Description("Path to the plc-knowledge.db file.")] string dbPath,
        [Description("Block name, e.g. 'Main'.")] string block,
        [Description("1-based network index.")] int networkIndex)
        => Invoke(() => NetworkDetail(dbPath, block, networkIndex));

    [McpServerTool(Name = "search")]
    [Description("Case-insensitive substring search over node names and network title / logicStatements text (read-only).")]
    public CallToolResult Search(
        [Description("Path to the plc-knowledge.db file.")] string dbPath,
        [Description("Substring to find.")] string text,
        [Description("Optional node-kind filter, e.g. 'Network', 'OB', 'Variable'.")] string? kind = null,
        [Description("Maximum matches to return (default 50, hard cap 200).")] int? maxRows = null)
        => Invoke(() => SearchGraph(dbPath, text, kind, maxRows));
```

```csharp
private sealed record BlockNodeInfo(string Id, string Kind, string Name, string? SourceFile, string? FolderPath);
private sealed record NetworkInfo(string Id, int? Index, string? CompileUnitId, string? Title, string? Language, string? LogicStatements);
```

NetworkDetail:
```csharp
    private static object NetworkDetail(string dbPath, string block, int networkIndex)
    {
        if (networkIndex < 1) throw new KnowledgeToolException("NETWORK_NOT_FOUND", ...);
        using var connection = OpenReadOnly(dbPath);
        var blockNode = FindBlockNode(connection, block);
        var networks = ReadNetworks(connection, blockNode.Id);
        var network = networks.FirstOrDefault(n => n.Index == networkIndex);
        if (network == null)
        {
            var available = string.Join(", ", networks.Select(n => n.Index?.ToString(...) ?? "?"));
            throw new KnowledgeToolException("NETWORK_NOT_FOUND", $"Block '{blockNode.Name}' has no network {networkIndex} (available: {available}).", "Pass a 1-based network index from get_block.");
        }
        var reads = ReadAccessNames(connection, network.Id, "READS");
        var writes = ReadAccessNames(connection, network.Id, "WRITES");
        var calls = ReadCalls(connection, network.Id);
        return new { block = blockNode, network, reads, writes, calls };
    }
```

SearchGraph:
```csharp
    private static object SearchGraph(string dbPath, string text, string? kind, int? maxRows)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(text))
        {
            throw new KnowledgeToolException("SEARCH_TEXT_REQUIRED", "Search text must not be empty.", "Pass a substring to find in node names or network logic text.");
        }
        var limit = maxRows is null ? DefaultSearchMaxRows : Math.Clamp(maxRows.Value, 1, HardSearchMaxRows);
        var pattern = "%" + text.Replace("\\", "\\\\").Replace("%", "\\%").Replace("_", "\\_") + "%";
        using var connection = OpenReadOnly(dbPath);
        using var command = connection.CreateCommand();
        var kindFilterNodes = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(kind) ? string.Empty : "AND kind = @kind";
        var kindFilterProps = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(kind) ? string.Empty : "AND n.kind = @kind";
        command.CommandText = $"""
            SELECT id, kind, name, 'name' AS matchedIn, NULL AS snippet
            FROM graph_nodes
            WHERE name LIKE @pattern ESCAPE '\' {kindFilterNodes}
            UNION ALL
            SELECT n.id, n.kind, n.name, p.name AS matchedIn, p.value AS snippet
            FROM graph_nodes n
            JOIN graph_node_properties p ON p.node_id = n.id AND p.name IN ('title', 'logicStatements')
            WHERE p.value LIKE @pattern ESCAPE '\' {kindFilterProps}
            ORDER BY kind, id
            LIMIT @limit;
            """;
```

Wait — ESCAPE '\' in SQL text: the backslash in a SQL string literal `'\'` is fine (SQLite doesn't process backslash escapes in strings). In C# interpolated raw string literal, `'\'` is fine as-is. OK.

Parameters: @pattern, @kind (if), @limit = limit + 1. Read rows; truncated = count > limit; trim to limit.

Match record: `private sealed record SearchMatch(string Id, string Kind, string Name, string MatchedIn, string? Snippet);` Snippet truncated to 300 chars:
```csharp
var snippet = reader.IsDBNull(4) ? null : reader.GetString(4);
if (snippet is { Length > SnippetMaxLength }) snippet = snippet[..SnippetMaxLength] + "…";
```

Result: `new { text, kind, matches, truncated }` — kind null when not passed (omitted in JSON). Good.

```csharp
    {

            SELECT id, kind, name FROM graph_nodes

            ORDER BY id
            LIMIT 1;
            """;
        command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@name", block);

                "BLOCK_NOT_FOUND",
                $"Program block '{block}' was not found.",

        }
        var id = reader.GetString(0);
        ... read props for sourceFile/folderPath
    }
```

Helper code:

```csharp
    private static object BlockDetail(string dbPath, string block)
    {
        using var connection = OpenReadOnly(dbPath);
        var blockNode = FindBlockNode(connection, block);
        var networks = ReadNetworks(connection, blockNode.Id);
        return new
        {
            block = blockNode,
            networks,
        };
    }

    private static object NetworkDetail(string dbPath, string block, int networkIndex)
    {
        using var connection = OpenReadOnly(dbPath);
        var blockNode = FindBlockNode(connection, block);
        var networks = ReadNetworks(connection, blockNode.Id);
        var network = networks.FirstOrDefault(item => item.Index == networkIndex);
        if (network == null)
        {
            var available = string.Join(", ", networks.Select(item => item.Index?.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) ?? "?"));
            throw new KnowledgeToolException(
                "NETWORK_NOT_FOUND",
                $"Block '{blockNode.Name}' has no network with index {networkIndex} (available: {available}).",
                "Pass a 1-based network index as listed by get_block.");
        }

        return new
        {
            block = blockNode,
            network,
            reads = ReadAccessNames(connection, network.Id, "READS"),
            writes = ReadAccessNames(connection, network.Id, "WRITES"),
            calls = ReadCalls(connection, network.Id),
        };
    }

    private static object SearchGraph(string dbPath, string text, string? kind, int? maxRows)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(text))
        {
            throw new KnowledgeToolException(
                "SEARCH_TEXT_REQUIRED",
                "Search text must not be empty.",
                "Pass a substring to find in node names, network titles or logicStatements.");
        }

        var limit = maxRows is null ? DefaultSearchMaxRows : Math.Clamp(maxRows.Value, 1, HardSearchMaxRows);
        var pattern = "%" + text.Replace("\\", "\\\\").Replace("%", "\\%").Replace("_", "\\_") + "%";
        var hasKind = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(kind);
        using var connection = OpenReadOnly(dbPath);
        using var command = connection.CreateCommand();
        command.CommandText = $"""
            SELECT id, kind, name, 'name' AS matchedIn, NULL AS snippet
            FROM graph_nodes
            WHERE name LIKE @pattern ESCAPE '\' {(hasKind ? "AND kind = @kind" : string.Empty)}
            UNION ALL
            SELECT n.id, n.kind, n.name, p.name AS matchedIn, p.value AS snippet
            FROM graph_nodes n
            JOIN graph_node_properties p ON p.node_id = n.id AND p.name IN ('title', 'logicStatements')
            WHERE p.value LIKE @pattern ESCAPE '\' {(hasKind ? "AND n.kind = @kind" : string.Empty)}
            ORDER BY kind, id
            LIMIT @limit;
            """;
        command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@pattern", pattern);
        if (hasKind)
        {
            command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@kind", kind);
        }
        command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@limit", limit + 1);

        var matches = new List<SearchMatch>();
        using var reader = command.ExecuteReader();
        while (reader.Read())
        {
            var snippet = reader.IsDBNull(4) ? null : reader.GetString(4);
            if (snippet is { Length > SearchSnippetMaxLength })
            {
                snippet = snippet[..SearchSnippetMaxLength] + "…";
            }

            matches.Add(new SearchMatch(
                reader.GetString(0),
                reader.GetString(1),
                reader.GetString(2),
                reader.GetString(3),
                snippet));
        }

        var truncated = matches.Count > limit;
        if (truncated)
        {
            matches.RemoveAt(matches.Count - 1);
        }

        return new { text, kind, matches, truncated };
    }
```

Wait — `NULL AS snippet` in UNION with text column: SQLite type affinity fine, reader.GetString(4) on non-null works; NULL → IsDBNull. Good.

Note on `ESCAPE '\'` in the C# interpolated raw string: `ESCAPE '\'` — in a raw string literal `"""..."""`, backslash is literal, so SQL receives `ESCAPE '\'` — correct SQLite syntax.

OpenReadOnly:
```csharp
    private static SqliteConnection OpenReadOnly(string dbPath)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(dbPath) || !File.Exists(dbPath))
        {
            throw new KnowledgeToolException(
                "DB_NOT_FOUND",
                $"Database '{dbPath}' was not found.",
                "Run ingest_source first, or check the dbPath.");
        }

        SqliteSemanticGraphStore.EnsureSqliteInitialized();
        var connectionString = new SqliteConnectionStringBuilder
        {
            DataSource = dbPath,
            Mode = SqliteOpenMode.ReadOnly,
        }.ToString();
        var connection = new SqliteConnection(connectionString);
        connection.Open();
        return connection;
    }
```

FindBlockNode:
```csharp
    private static BlockNodeInfo FindBlockNode(SqliteConnection connection, string block)
    {
        using var command = connection.CreateCommand();
        command.CommandText = """
            SELECT id, kind, name
            FROM graph_nodes
            WHERE name = @name COLLATE NOCASE
              AND kind IN ('OB', 'FB', 'FC')
            ORDER BY id
            LIMIT 1;
            """;
        command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@name", block);
        string? id = null;
        string? kind = null;
        string? name = null;
        using (var reader = command.ExecuteReader())
        {
            if (reader.Read())
            {
                id = reader.GetString(0);
                kind = reader.GetString(1);
                name = reader.GetString(2);
            }
        }

        if (id == null || kind == null || name == null)
        {
            throw new KnowledgeToolException(
                "BLOCK_NOT_FOUND",
                $"Program block '{block}' was not found.",
                "Check the name; list blocks via query: SELECT id, kind, name FROM graph_nodes WHERE kind IN ('OB','FB','FC') ORDER BY kind, name;");
        }

        using var properties = connection.CreateCommand();
        properties.CommandText = "SELECT name, value FROM graph_node_properties WHERE node_id = @id AND name IN ('sourceFile', 'folderPath');";
        properties.Parameters.AddWithValue("@id", id);
        string? sourceFile = null;
        string? folderPath = null;
        using (var reader = properties.ExecuteReader())
        {
            while (reader.Read())
            {
                if (reader.GetString(0) == "sourceFile")
                {
                    sourceFile = reader.GetString(1);
                }
                else
                {
                    folderPath = reader.GetString(1);
                }
            }
        }

        return new BlockNodeInfo(id, kind, name, sourceFile, folderPath);
    }
```

ReadNetworks:
```csharp
    private static List<NetworkInfo> ReadNetworks(SqliteConnection connection, string blockId)
    {
        using var command = connection.CreateCommand();
        command.CommandText = """
            SELECT
              network.id,
              idx.value,
              cu.value,
              title.value,
              lang.value,
              logic.value
            FROM graph_edges e
            JOIN graph_nodes network ON network.id = e.to_node_id AND network.kind = 'Network'
            LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties idx ON idx.node_id = network.id AND idx.name = 'networkIndex'
            LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties cu ON cu.node_id = network.id AND cu.name = 'compileUnitId'
            LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties title ON title.node_id = network.id AND title.name = 'title'
            LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties lang ON lang.node_id = network.id AND lang.name = 'language'
            LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties logic ON logic.node_id = network.id AND logic.name = 'logicStatements'
            WHERE e.type = 'CONTAINS' AND e.from_node_id = @blockId
            ORDER BY CAST(idx.value AS INTEGER);
            """;
        command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@blockId", blockId);
        var networks = new List<NetworkInfo>();
        using var reader = command.ExecuteReader();
        while (reader.Read())
        {
            var indexText = reader.IsDBNull(1) ? null : reader.GetString(1);
            int? index = int.TryParse(indexText, System.Globalization.NumberStyles.Integer, System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, out var parsed) ? parsed : null;
            networks.Add(new NetworkInfo(
                reader.GetString(0),
                index,
                reader.IsDBNull(2) ? null : reader.GetString(2),
                reader.IsDBNull(3) ? null : reader.GetString(3),
                reader.IsDBNull(4) ? null : reader.GetString(4),
                reader.IsDBNull(5) ? null : reader.GetString(5)));
        }

        return networks;
    }
```

ReadAccessNames:
```csharp
    private static string[] ReadAccessNames(SqliteConnection connection, string networkId, string relationship)
    {
        using var command = connection.CreateCommand();
        command.CommandText = """
            SELECT symbol.name
            FROM graph_edges e
            JOIN graph_nodes symbol ON symbol.id = e.to_node_id
            WHERE e.type = @relationship AND e.from_node_id = @networkId
            ORDER BY symbol.name;
            """;
        command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@relationship", relationship);
        command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@networkId", networkId);
        var names = new List<string>();
        using var reader = command.ExecuteReader();
        while (reader.Read())
        {
            names.Add(reader.GetString(0));
        }

        return names.ToArray();
    }
```

ReadCalls:
```csharp
    private static CallInfo[] ReadCalls(SqliteConnection connection, string networkId)
    {
        using var command = connection.CreateCommand();
        command.CommandText = """
            SELECT callee.name, callee.kind
            FROM graph_edges contains
            JOIN graph_nodes instruction ON instruction.id = contains.to_node_id AND instruction.kind = 'Instruction'
            JOIN graph_edges calls ON calls.from_node_id = instruction.id AND calls.type = 'CALLS'
            JOIN graph_nodes callee ON callee.id = calls.to_node_id
            WHERE contains.type = 'CONTAINS' AND contains.from_node_id = @networkId
            ORDER BY callee.name;
            """;
        command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@networkId", networkId);
        var calls = new List<CallInfo>();
        using var reader = command.ExecuteReader();
        while (reader.Read())
        {
            calls.Add(new CallInfo(reader.GetString(0), reader.GetString(1)));
        }

        return calls.ToArray();
    }
```

```csharp
    private sealed record SearchMatch(string Id, string Kind, string Name, string MatchedIn, string? Snippet);
```

```json
  "new_string": "    private static object BlockDetail(string dbPath, string block)\n    {\n        using var connection = OpenReadOnly(dbPath);\n        var blockNode = FindBlockNode(connection, block);\n        var networks = ReadNetworks(connection, blockNode.Id);\n        return new\n        {\n            block = blockNode,\n            networks,\n        };\n    }\n\n    private static object NetworkDetail(string dbPath, string block, int networkIndex)\n    {\n        using var connection = OpenReadOnly(dbPath);\n        var blockNode = FindBlockNode(connection, block);\n        var networks = ReadNetworks(connection, blockNode.Id);\n        var network = networks.FirstOrDefault(item => item.Index == networkIndex);\n        if (network == null)\n        {\n            var available = string.Join(\", \", networks.Select(item => item.Index?.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) ?? \"?\"));\n            throw new KnowledgeToolException(\n                \"NETWORK_NOT_FOUND\",\n                $\"Block '{blockNode.Name}' has no network with index {networkIndex} (available: {available}).\",\n                \"Pass a 1-based network index as listed by get_block.\");\n        }\n\n        return new\n        {\n            block = blockNode,\n            network,\n            reads = ReadAccessNames(connection, network.Id, \"READS\"),\n            writes = ReadAccessNames(connection, network.Id, \"WRITES\"),\n            calls = ReadCalls(connection, network.Id),\n        };\n    }\n\n    private static object SearchGraph(string dbPath, string text, string? kind, int? maxRows)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(text))\n        {\n            throw new KnowledgeToolException(\n                \"SEARCH_TEXT_REQUIRED\",\n                \"Search text must not be empty.\",\n                \"Pass a substring to find in node names, network titles or logicStatements.\");\n        }\n\n        var limit = maxRows is null ? DefaultSearchMaxRows : Math.Clamp(maxRows.Value, 1, HardSearchMaxRows);\n        var pattern = \"%\" + text.Replace(\"\\\\\", \"\\\\\\\\\").Replace(\"%\", \"\\\\%\").Replace(\"_\", \"\\\\_\") + \"%\";\n        var hasKind = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(kind);\n        using var connection = OpenReadOnly(dbPath);\n        using var command = connection.CreateCommand();\n        command.CommandText = $\"\"\"\n            SELECT id, kind, name, 'name' AS matchedIn, NULL AS snippet\n            FROM graph_nodes\n            WHERE name LIKE @pattern ESCAPE '\\' {(hasKind ? \"AND kind = @kind\" : string.Empty)}\n            UNION ALL\n            SELECT n.id, n.kind, n.name, p.name AS matchedIn, p.value AS snippet\n            FROM graph_nodes n\n            JOIN graph_node_properties p ON p.node_id = n.id AND p.name IN ('title', 'logicStatements')\n            WHERE p.value LIKE @pattern ESCAPE '\\' {(hasKind ? \"AND n.kind = @kind\" : string.Empty)}\n            ORDER BY kind, id\n            LIMIT @limit;\n            \"\"\";\n        command.Parameters.AddWithValue(\"@pattern\", pattern);\n        if (hasKind)\n        {\n            command.Parameters.AddWithValue(\"@kind\", kind);\n        }\n\n        command.Parameters.AddWithValue(\"@limit\", limit + 1);\n\n        var matches = new List<SearchMatch>();\n        using var reader = command.ExecuteReader();\n        while (reader.Read())\n        {\n            var snippet = reader.IsDBNull(4) ? null : reader.GetString(4);\n            if (snippet is { Length > SearchSnippetMaxLength })\n            {\n                snippet = snippet[..SearchSnippetMaxLength] + \"…\";\n            }\n\n            matches.Add(new SearchMatch(\n                reader.GetString(0),\n                reader.GetString(1),\n                reader.GetString(2),\n                reader.GetString(3),\n                snippet));\n        }\n\n        var truncated = matches.Count > limit;\n        if (truncated)\n        {\n            matches.RemoveAt(matches.Count - 1);\n        }\n\n        return new { text, kind, matches, truncated };\n    }\n\n    private static SqliteConnection OpenReadOnly(string dbPath)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(dbPath) || !File.Exists(dbPath))\n        {\n            throw new KnowledgeToolException(\n                \"DB_NOT_FOUND\",\n                $\"Database '{dbPath}' was not found.\",\n                \"Run ingest_source first, or check the dbPath.\");\n        }\n\n        SqliteSemanticGraphStore.EnsureSqliteInitialized();\n        var connectionString = new SqliteConnectionStringBuilder\n        {\n            DataSource = dbPath,\n            Mode = SqliteOpenMode.ReadOnly,\n        }.ToString();\n        var connection = new SqliteConnection(connectionString);\n        connection.Open();\n        return connection;\n    }\n\n    private static BlockNodeInfo FindBlockNode(SqliteConnection connection, string block)\n    {\n        using var command = connection.CreateCommand();\n        command.CommandText = \"\"\"\n            SELECT id, kind, name\n            FROM graph_nodes\n            WHERE name = @name COLLATE NOCASE\n              AND kind IN ('OB', 'FB', 'FC')\n            ORDER BY id\n            LIMIT 1;\n            \"\"\";\n        command.Parameters.AddWithValue(\"@name\", block);\n        string? id = null;\n        string? kind = null;\n        string? name = null;\n        using (var reader = command.ExecuteReader())\n        {\n            if (reader.Read())\n            {\n                id = reader.GetString(0);\n                kind = reader.GetString(1);\n                name = reader.GetString(2);\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (id == null || kind == null || name == null)\n        {\n            throw new KnowledgeToolException(\n                \"BLOCK_NOT_FOUND\",\n                $\"Program block '{block}' was not found.\",\n                \"Check the name; list blocks via query: SELECT id, kind, name FROM graph_nodes WHERE kind IN ('OB','FB','FC') ORDER BY kind, name;\");\n        }\n\n        using var properties = connection.CreateCommand();\n        properties.CommandText = \"SELECT name, value FROM graph_node_properties WHERE node_id = @id AND name IN ('sourceFile', 'folderPath');\";\n        properties.Parameters.AddWithValue(\"@id\", id);\n        string? sourceFile = null;\n        string? folderPath = null;\n        using (var reader = properties.ExecuteReader())\n        {\n            while (reader.Read())\n            {\n                if (reader.GetString(0) == \"sourceFile\")\n                {\n                    sourceFile = reader.GetString(1);\n                }\n                else\n                {\n                    folderPath = reader.GetString(1);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        return new BlockNodeInfo(id, kind, name, sourceFile, folderPath);\n    }\n\n    private static List<NetworkInfo> ReadNetworks(SqliteConnection connection, string blockId)\n    {\n        using var command = connection.CreateCommand();\n        command.CommandText = \"\"\"\n            SELECT\n              network.id,\n              idx.value,\n              cu.value,\n              title.value,\n              lang.value,\n              logic.value\n            FROM graph_edges e\n            JOIN graph_nodes network ON network.id = e.to_node_id AND network.kind = 'Network'\n            LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties idx ON idx.node_id = network.id AND idx.name = 'networkIndex'\n            LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties cu ON cu.node_id = network.id AND cu.name = 'compileUnitId'\n            LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties title ON title.node_id = network.id AND title.name = 'title'\n            LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties lang ON lang.node_id = network.id AND lang.name = 'language'\n            LEFT JOIN graph_node_properties logic ON logic.node_id = network.id AND logic.name = 'logicStatements'\n            WHERE e.type = 'CONTAINS' AND e.from_node_id = @blockId\n            ORDER BY CAST(idx.value AS INTEGER);\n            \"\"\";\n        command.Parameters.AddWithValue(\"@blockId\", blockId);\n        var networks = new List<NetworkInfo>();\n        using var reader = command.ExecuteReader();\n        while (reader.Read())\n        {\n            var indexText = reader.IsDBNull(1) ? null : reader.GetString(1);\n            int? index = int.TryParse(indexText, System.Globalization.NumberStyles.Integer, System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, out var parsed)\n                ? parsed\n                : null;\n            networks.Add(new NetworkInfo(\n                reader.GetString(0),\n                index,\n                reader.IsDBNull(2) ? null : reader.GetString(2),\n                reader.IsDBNull(3) ? null : reader.GetString(3),\n                reader.IsDBNull(4) ? null : reader.GetString(4),\n                reader.IsDBNull(5) ? null : reader.GetString(5)));\n        }\n\n        return networks;\n    }\n\n    private static string[] ReadAccessNames(SqliteConnection connection, string networkId, string relationship)\n    {\n        using var command = connection.CreateCommand();\n        command.CommandText = \"\"\"\n            SELECT symbol.name\n            FROM graph_edges e\n            JOIN graph_nodes symbol ON symbol.id = e.to_node_id\n            WHERE e.type = @relationship AND e.from_node_id = @networkId\n            ORDER BY symbol.name;\n            \"\"\";\n        command.Parameters.AddWithValue(\"@relationship\", relationship);\n        command.Parameters.AddWithValue(\"@networkId\", networkId);\n        var names = new List<string>();\n        using var reader = command.ExecuteReader();\n        while (reader.Read())\n        {\n            names.Add(reader.GetString(0));\n        }\n\n        return names.ToArray();\n    }\n\n    private static CallInfo[] ReadCalls(SqliteConnection connection, string networkId)\n    {\n        using var command = connection.CreateCommand();\n        command.CommandText = \"\"\"\n            SELECT callee.name, callee.kind\n            FROM graph_edges contains\n            JOIN graph_nodes instruction ON instruction.id = contains.to_node_id AND instruction.kind = 'Instruction'\n            JOIN graph_edges calls ON calls.from_node_id = instruction.id AND calls.type = 'CALLS'\n            JOIN graph_nodes callee ON callee.id = calls.to_node_id\n            WHERE contains.type = 'CONTAINS' AND contains.from_node_id = @networkId\n            ORDER BY callee.name;\n            \"\"\";\n        command.Parameters.AddWithValue(\"@networkId\", networkId);\n        var calls = new List<CallInfo>();\n        using var reader = command.ExecuteReader();\n        while (reader.Read())\n        {\n            calls.Add(new CallInfo(reader.GetString(0), reader.GetString(1)));\n        }\n\n        return calls.ToArray();\n    }\n\n    private sealed record BlockNodeInfo(string Id, string Kind, string Name, string? SourceFile, string? FolderPath);\n\n    private sealed record NetworkInfo(string Id, int? Index, string? CompileUnitId, string? Title, string? Language, string? LogicStatements);\n\n    private sealed record CallInfo(string Name, string Kind);\n\n    private sealed record SearchMatch(string Id, string Kind, string Name, string MatchedIn, string? Snippet);\n\n    private static CallToolResult Invoke(Func<object> action)",
```

CS8503: extended property patterns need `Length:` syntax — wait, `{ Length > X }` IS valid C# 10 extended property pattern... Actually the error says "A property subpattern requires a reference to the property or field to be matched, e.g. '{ Name: Length > ... }'". Hmm — `{ Length: > X }`? Extended property patterns allow `A.B.C: pattern`. The form `{ Length > 5 }` — hmm, that shorthand isn't valid; you need `{ Length: > 5 }`? Let me think. C# 9 property pattern: `{ Length: 5 }` or `{ Length: > 5 }` — the colon is required. I wrote `{ Length > SearchSnippetMaxLength }` — missing the colon. Right, my mistake: it should be `{ Length: > SearchSnippetMaxLength }`.

The project must be on an older LangVersion? No — even C# 13 requires the colon. Fix: add colon.

18	    {

22	            new ProgramBlockComponent("Main", "OB", "Program blocks/Main", "Main [OB1].xml"),
23	            graph);
24	
25	        Assert.Equal(SemanticNodeKind.OrganizationBlock, graph.GetNode("block:Main").Kind);

29	        Assert.Equal(SemanticNodeKind.Network, network1.Kind);
30	        Assert.Equal("Network 1", network1.Properties["title"]);
31	        Assert.Equal("LAD", network1.Properties["language"]);
32	        Assert.Equal("1", network1.Properties["networkIndex"]);
33	        Assert.Equal("3", network1.Properties["compileUnitId"]);
34	        Assert.Equal(SemanticNodeKind.Network, graph.GetNode("network:Main:2").Kind);
35	
36	        // Callee is not part of this import: placeholder node flagged declaredByReference.
37	        var callee = graph.GetNode("block:FC_LAD_SimulateCylinder_Call");
38	        Assert.Equal(SemanticNodeKind.Function, callee.Kind);
39	        Assert.Equal("true", callee.Properties["declaredByReference"]);
40	
41	        var instruction = graph.GetNode("instruction:Main:1:call:1");
42	        Assert.Equal(SemanticNodeKind.Instruction, instruction.Kind);
43	        Assert.Equal("CALL", instruction.Properties["instructionKind"]);
44	        Assert.Equal("FC", instruction.Properties["calleeBlockType"]);
45	
46	        Assert.Equal(SemanticNodeKind.Variable, graph.GetNode("symbol:Btn_ForwardCommand").Kind);
47	        Assert.Equal("GlobalVariable", graph.GetNode("symbol:Btn_ForwardCommand").Properties["scope"]);
48	
49	        Assert.Contains(graph.Edges, edge =>
50	            edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.Contains &&
51	            edge.FromNodeId == "block:Main" &&
52	            edge.ToNodeId == "network:Main:1");
53	        Assert.Contains(graph.Edges, edge =>
54	            edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.ExecutesBefore &&
55	            edge.FromNodeId == "network:Main:1" &&
56	            edge.ToNodeId == "network:Main:2");
57	        Assert.Contains(graph.Edges, edge =>
58	            edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.ExecutesAfter &&
59	            edge.FromNodeId == "network:Main:2" &&
60	            edge.ToNodeId == "network:Main:1");
61	        Assert.Contains(graph.Edges, edge =>
62	            edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.Contains &&
63	            edge.FromNodeId == "network:Main:1" &&
64	            edge.ToNodeId == "instruction:Main:1:call:1");
65	        Assert.Contains(graph.Edges, edge =>
66	            edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.Calls &&
67	            edge.FromNodeId == "instruction:Main:1:call:1" &&
68	            edge.ToNodeId == "block:FC_LAD_SimulateCylinder_Call");
69	        Assert.Contains(graph.Edges, edge =>
70	            edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.Calls &&
71	            edge.FromNodeId == "block:Main" &&
72	            edge.ToNodeId == "block:FC_LAD_SimulateCylinder_Call" &&
73	            edge.Properties["networkId"] == "network:Main:1");
74	        Assert.Contains(graph.Edges, edge =>
75	            edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.Reads &&
76	            edge.FromNodeId == "block:Main" &&
77	            edge.ToNodeId == "symbol:Btn_ForwardCommand" &&
78	            edge.Properties["parameter"] == "btn_forward");
79	        Assert.Contains(graph.Edges, edge =>
80	            edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.Writes &&
81	            edge.FromNodeId == "block:Main" &&
82	            edge.ToNodeId == "symbol:CylinderGoForwardPos" &&
83	            edge.Properties["parameter"] == "outputGoForwardPos");
84	
85	        // InOut parameters produce both READS and WRITES edges.

89	            edge.ToNodeId == "symbol:Cylinder@ForwardPos");

91	            edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.Writes &&
92	            edge.FromNodeId == "block:Main" &&

229	internal static class GraphAssert
230	{
231	    public static void Equal(SemanticPlcGraph expected, SemanticPlcGraph actual)
232	    {
233	        Assert.Equal(expected.Nodes.Select(node => node.Id).ToArray(), actual.Nodes.Select(node => node.Id).ToArray());
234	        foreach (var expectedNode in expected.Nodes)
235	        {
236	            var actualNode = actual.GetNode(expectedNode.Id);
237	            Assert.Equal(expectedNode.Kind, actualNode.Kind);
238	            Assert.Equal(expectedNode.Name, actualNode.Name);
239	            Assert.Equal(
240	                expectedNode.Properties.OrderBy(item => item.Key, StringComparer.Ordinal),
241	                actualNode.Properties.OrderBy(item => item.Key, StringComparer.Ordinal));
242	        }
243	
244	        Assert.Equal(expected.Edges.Select(edge => edge.Id).ToArray(), actual.Edges.Select(edge => edge.Id).ToArray());
245	        foreach (var expectedEdge in expected.Edges)
246	        {
247	            var actualEdge = actual.Edges.Single(edge => edge.Id == expectedEdge.Id);
248	            Assert.Equal(expectedEdge.FromNodeId, actualEdge.FromNodeId);
249	            Assert.Equal(expectedEdge.ToNodeId, actualEdge.ToNodeId);
250	            Assert.Equal(expectedEdge.Type, actualEdge.Type);
251	            Assert.Equal(
252	                expectedEdge.Properties.OrderBy(item => item.Key, StringComparer.Ordinal),
253	                actualEdge.Properties.OrderBy(item => item.Key, StringComparer.Ordinal));
254	        }
255	    }
256	}

1	using System.IO;

10	public sealed class IngestSourceToolTests
11	{
12	    [Fact]
13	    public void IngestsFixtureTreeEndToEndIntoTempDb()
14	    {
15	        using var tree = CreateFixtureTree();
16	        var tools = new KnowledgeTools();
17	
18	        var result = ToolResults.OkJson(tools.IngestSource(tree.Root, null));
19	
20	        // Default dbPath is <exportRoot>/plc-knowledge.db.
21	        var expectedDbPath = Path.Combine(tree.Root, "plc-knowledge.db");
22	        Assert.Equal(expectedDbPath, result.GetProperty("dbPath").GetString());
23	        Assert.True(File.Exists(expectedDbPath));
24	        Assert.Equal(4, result.GetProperty("filesFound").GetInt32());
25	        Assert.Equal(4, result.GetProperty("filesImported").GetInt32());
26	        Assert.Equal(0, result.GetProperty("warnings").GetArrayLength());
27	
28	        // Counts match a direct crawler import of the same tree.
29	        var direct = ExportFolderCrawler.Import(tree.Root);
30	        Assert.Equal(direct.Graph.Nodes.Count, result.GetProperty("nodes").GetInt32());
31	        Assert.Equal(direct.Graph.Edges.Count, result.GetProperty("edges").GetInt32());
32	
33	        var byKind = result.GetProperty("byKind");
34	        Assert.Equal(1, byKind.GetProperty("OB").GetInt32());
35	        Assert.Equal(1, byKind.GetProperty("FC").GetInt32());
36	        Assert.Equal(9, byKind.GetProperty("Network").GetInt32());
37	        Assert.Equal(1, byKind.GetProperty("Instruction").GetInt32());
38	        Assert.Equal(1, byKind.GetProperty("Project").GetInt32());
39	        Assert.Equal(1, byKind.GetProperty("Global DB").GetInt32());
40	        Assert.Equal(1, byKind.GetProperty("Instance DB").GetInt32());
41	        Assert.Equal(7, byKind.GetProperty("DB Member").GetInt32());
42	
43	        // Persisted DB: project node + CONTAINS edges to the four top-level objects.
44	        var loaded = SqliteSemanticGraphStore.Load(expectedDbPath);
45	        var projectId = $"project:{Path.GetFileName(tree.Root)}";
46	        Assert.Equal(SemanticNodeKind.Project, loaded.GetNode(projectId).Kind);
47	        foreach (var target in new[] { "block:Main", "block:FC_LAD_SimulateCylinder_Call", "db:GlobalData", "db:MotorFbInstance" })
48	        {
49	            Assert.Contains(loaded.Edges, edge =>
50	                edge.Type == SemanticRelationshipType.Contains &&
51	                edge.FromNodeId == projectId &&
52	                edge.ToNodeId == target);
53	        }
54	    }

1	using System;
2	using System.IO;
3	
4	namespace Mcp.Knowledge.Tests;
5	
6	/// <summary>Temp-folder export tree mimicking an mcp-engineering output folder (incl. nested duplicates).</summary>
7	internal sealed class TempExportTree : IDisposable
8	{
9	    public TempExportTree()
10	    {
11	        Root = Path.Combine(Path.GetTempPath(), "Mcp.Knowledge.Tests", Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N"));
12	        Directory.CreateDirectory(Root);
13	    }
14	
15	    public string Root { get; }
16	
17	    public string AddFixture(string fixturePath, string relativePath)
18	    {
19	        var target = Path.Combine(Root, relativePath);
20	        Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(target)!);
21	        File.Copy(fixturePath, target);
22	        return target;
23	    }
24	
25	    public string AddText(string relativePath, string content)
26	    {
27	        var target = Path.Combine(Root, relativePath);
28	        Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(target)!);
29	        File.WriteAllText(target, content);
30	        return target;
31	    }
32	
33	    public void Dispose()
34	    {
35	        try
36	        {
37	            Directory.Delete(Root, recursive: true);
38	        }
39	        catch
40	        {
41	            // best effort; temp files are harmless
42	        }
43	    }
44	}

All conventions clear. Now the plan for tests:

1. **Translation tests** (`ProgramBlockLogicTests.cs`) — port the ~25 reference cases from `PlcExportServiceTests.cs` (lines 393–1290) to direct `ProgramBlockLogicYamlWriter.GetNetworkStatementTextByCompileUnitId` calls. This is the big one; I'll delegate to a coder subagent with precise instructions: read the reference test file, extract each translation test's XML + expected statements, produce direct-call tests. The subagent must preserve expected strings EXACTLY. Note: reference tests assert `Assert.Contains("- \"...\"", yaml)` — the ported version should assert the statement list equals/contains the exact strings.

2. **Wiring test** — add to SemanticPlcGraphTests: import Main OB fixture → network:Main:1 has logicStatements property (call statement), and update the stale header note. I need to know the actual statement text the translator produces for the fixture. Let me run a quick harness to see (or leave the assertion as `Assert.True(ContainsKey)` + maybe assert the call statement content). Better: assert exact content after generating it once via a scratch run. The FC fixture networks will also produce statements.

<!-- call_id: tool_yTrwIeQYIkJWALujbMNJ1R47 -->
1	// Minimal stateful MCP stdio client for E2E checks of Mcp.Engineering.exe.
2	// Usage: node scripts/mcp-e2e.mjs <server-exe> <steps.json>
3	// steps.json: [{ "tool": "name", "args": {...}, "timeout": ms? }, ...]
4	import { spawn } from 'node:child_process';
5	import readline from 'node:readline';
6	import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs';
7	
8	const [, , exe, stepsFile] = process.argv;
9	if (!exe || !stepsFile) {
10	  console.error('usage: node scripts/mcp-e2e.mjs <server-exe> <steps.json>');
11	  process.exit(2);
12	}
13	const steps = JSON.parse(readFileSync(stepsFile, 'utf8'));
14	
15	const child = spawn(exe, [], { stdio: ['pipe', 'pipe', 'inherit'] });
16	const rl = readline.createInterface({ input: child.stdout });
17	const pending = new Map();
18	let nextId = 1;
19	let failed = false;
20	
21	rl.on('line', (line) => {
22	  let msg;
23	  try { msg = JSON.parse(line); } catch { return; } // not JSON-RPC (should not happen on stdout)
24	  if (msg.id !== undefined && pending.has(msg.id)) {
25	    pending.get(msg.id)(msg);
26	    pending.delete(msg.id);
27	  }
28	});
29	
30	function request(method, params, timeoutMs = 120000) {
31	  const id = nextId++;
32	  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
33	    pending.set(id, resolve);
34	    child.stdin.write(JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', id, method, params }) + '\n');
35	    setTimeout(() => {
36	      if (pending.has(id)) {
37	        pending.delete(id);
38	        reject(new Error(`timeout after ${timeoutMs}ms: ${method}`));
39	      }
40	    }, timeoutMs);
41	  });
42	}
43	
44	try {
45	  const init = await request('initialize', {
46	    protocolVersion: '2025-06-18',
47	    capabilities: {},
48	    clientInfo: { name: 'mcp-e2e', version: '0.1.0' },
49	  });
50	  console.log('initialize:', JSON.stringify(init.result?.serverInfo ?? init));
51	  child.stdin.write(JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', method: 'notifications/initialized' }) + '\n');
52	
53	  for (const step of steps) {
54	    if (step.argsFrom === 'firstSession') {
55	      // Resolve a live session id dynamically (attached-mode testing).
56	      const probe = await request('tools/call', { name: 'list_sessions', arguments: {} }, step.timeout);
57	      const sessions = JSON.parse(probe.result.content[0].text);
58	      const match = step.projectPathContains
59	        ? sessions.find((s) => s.projectPath?.includes(step.projectPathContains))
60	        : sessions[0];

</details>

The wiring test (to add to SemanticPlcGraphTests):

```csharp
[Fact]
public void EnrichesNetworkNodesWithLogicStatements()
{
    var graph = new SemanticPlcGraph();
    TiaXmlSemanticGraphImporter.ImportBlockXml(
        FixtureFiles.ReadAllText(FixtureFiles.MainObPath),
        new ProgramBlockComponent("Main", "OB", "Program blocks/Main", "Main [OB1].xml"),
        graph);
    TiaXmlSemanticGraphImporter.ImportBlockXml(
        FixtureFiles.ReadAllText(FixtureFiles.SimulateCylinderFcPath),
        new ProgramBlockComponent("FC_LAD_SimulateCylinder_Call", "FC", "Program blocks/FC_LAD_SimulateCylinder_Call", "FC_LAD_SimulateCylinder_Call [FC1].xml"),
        graph);

    // Translated LAD networks carry newline-delimited SCL-like statements.
    var network1 = graph.GetNode("network:Main:1");
    Assert.Equal(
        "FC_LAD_SimulateCylinder_Call(btn_forward := Btn_ForwardCommand, btn_backward := Btn_BackwardCommand, outputGoForwardPos => CylinderGoForwardPos, outputGoBackwardPos => CylinderGoBackwardPos, io_Cylinder@ForwardPos => Cylinder@ForwardPos, io_Cylinder@BackwardPos => Cylinder@ForwardPos);\nCylinderGoForwardPos := FC_LAD_SimulateCylinder_Call.OUTPUTGOFORWARDPOS;\nCylinderGoBackwardPos := FC_LAD_SimulateCylinder_Call.OUTPUTGOBACKWARDPOS;",
        network1.Properties["logicStatements"]);

    // Empty networks do not get the property.
    Assert.False(graph.GetNode("network:Main:2").Properties.ContainsKey("logicStatements"));
    Assert.False(graph.GetNode("network:FC_LAD_SimulateCylinder_Call:7").Properties.ContainsKey("logicStatements"));

    // Translated statements survive the SQLite round-trip.
    var dbPath = TempDbPath();
    SqliteSemanticGraphStore.Save(dbPath, graph);
    var loaded = SqliteSemanticGraphStore.Load(dbPath);
    Assert.Equal(network1.Properties["logicStatements"], loaded.GetNode("network:Main:1").Properties["logicStatements"]);
}
```

```csharp
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Mcp.Knowledge.Tools;
using Xunit;

namespace Mcp.Knowledge.Tests;

public sealed class QueryHelperToolTests
{
    [Fact]
    public void GetBlockReturnsNetworksWithLogicStatements()
    {
        using var db = new FixtureDb();
        var tools = new KnowledgeTools();

        var result = ToolResults.OkJson(tools.GetBlock(db.Path, "Main"));

        var block = result.GetProperty("block");
        Assert.Equal("block:Main", block.GetProperty("id").GetString());
        Assert.Equal("OB", block.GetProperty("kind").GetString());
        Assert.Equal("Main [OB1].xml", block.GetProperty("sourceFile").GetString());

        var networks = result.GetProperty("networks").EnumerateArray().ToArray();
        Assert.Equal(2, networks.Length);
        Assert.Equal(1, networks[0].GetProperty("index").GetInt32());
        Assert.Equal("3", networks[0].GetProperty("compileUnitId").GetString());
        Assert.Contains("FC_LAD_SimulateCylinder_Call(", networks[0].GetProperty("logicStatements").GetString());
        // Empty network omits logicStatements.
        Assert.False(networks[1].TryGetProperty("logicStatements", out _));
    }

    [Fact]
    public void GetBlockRejectsUnknownBlock() → BLOCK_NOT_FOUND

    [Fact]
    public void GetNetworkReturnsAccessesAndCalls()
    {
        get_network Main 1:
        network.compileUnitId "3"; logicStatements contains "FC_LAD_SimulateCylinder_Call(";
        reads contains Btn_ForwardCommand, Btn_BackwardCommand, Cylinder@ForwardPos (distinct — after DISTINCT fix, no dupes);
        writes contains CylinderGoForwardPos;
        calls single: name FC_LAD_SimulateCylinder_Call, kind FC.
    }

    [Fact]
    public void GetNetworkRejectsUnknownIndex() → NETWORK_NOT_FOUND, message contains available indexes

    [Fact]
    public void SearchMatchesNodeNames()
    {
        search "SimulateCylinder" → matches contain block:FC_LAD_SimulateCylinder_Call (matchedIn name); truncated false.
    }

    [Fact]
    public void SearchMatchesLogicStatementsWithKindFilter()
    {
        search "Btn_ForwardCommand" kind Network → all matches kind Network, matchedIn logicStatements, contains network:Main:1.
    }

    [Fact]
    public void SearchRejectsEmptyText() → SEARCH_TEXT_REQUIRED

    [Fact]
    public void HelpersRejectMissingDb() → DB_NOT_FOUND for get_block.
}
```

Now, for the delegated translation tests, I need to brief the coder subagent precisely:

- Source: `C:/Users/Ansel/Documents/Siemens TIA Add-in Dev/PlcSourceExporter/tests/PlcSourceExporter.Core.Tests/PlcExportServiceTests.cs` — translation test methods, roughly lines 309-1290 (methods named WritesCompactProgramBlockLogicYamlAfterMetadata, Translates*, Treats*).
- These tests run through PlcExportService + FakePlcSoftware — not portable. Convert each to a direct call:
  ```csharp
  var result = ProgramBlockLogicYamlWriter.GetNetworkStatementTextByCompileUnitId(xml, new ProgramBlockComponent(name, category, sourcePath, exportedFile));
  ```
  where xml is the `exportContent` string from the fake object.
- The assertions `Assert.Contains("- \"...\"", yaml)` become asserts on the dictionary values: for single-network cases `Assert.Equal(new[]{ "..." }, result.Values.Single())`? Careful: the dictionary key is compileUnitId; multiple networks → multiple entries. `Assert.Contains(expectedStatement, result.SelectMany(kv => kv.Value.Split('\n')))`? Hmm — better: assert that `result.Values` joined contains the exact statement string. Since statements within a network are "\n"-joined, an exact statement string appears as a full line: `Assert.Contains(expectedStatement, result.Values.SelectMany(v => v.Split('\n')))`. For DoesNotContain asserts (UId etc.): `Assert.DoesNotContain("UId", string.Join("\n", result.Values))`.
- Target file: tests/Mcp.Knowledge.Tests/ProgramBlockLogicTests.cs, namespace Mcp.Knowledge.Tests, xunit, using Mcp.Knowledge.Parsing.
- Multi-block tests (rare) — most use one block. If a test has multiple blocks, call per block and merge.
- Some tests are not translation tests (export orchestration) — skip those: ExportsNestedObjects..., ContinuesAfter..., SkipsObjects..., TreatsSiemensNotPermitted..., WritesComponentMetadata..., DoesNotWriteRetired..., WritesBlockProfiles... Keep: WritesCompactProgramBlockLogicYamlAfterMetadata (this one asserts YAML structure — port what's assertable: statements for known networks; or skip? It verifies compact yaml after metadata — mostly YAML file concerns. The subagent should check what it asserts and port the statement-level parts if reasonable, else skip with note).
- ProgramBlockComponent ctor: (name, category, sourcePath, exportedFile).
- Must run `dotnet test tests/Mcp.Knowledge.Tests --filter ProgramBlockLogicTests` and iterate until green.

One subtlety: the reference tests' XML uses `<SW.Blocks.FB ID="0">` with category "FunctionBlock". The component passed: name should match the block name in XML ("Logic"), category "FB" (component.Category used for LogicBlock.Kind only). The translator uses component.Name/Category/ExportedFile for the LogicBlock header — for GetNetworkStatementTextByCompileUnitId only networks matter; category doesn't affect statements. So component args: new ProgramBlockComponent("Logic", "FB", "Blocks/Logic", "Logic.xml") — values derived from the fake object args (source path "Blocks/Logic", type "FunctionBlock" → "FB").

Also note: `GetNetworkStatementTextByCompileUnitId` drops networks with no statements (Statements.Count == 0) — some reference tests assert empty statements or untranslated notes (e.g., TreatsEmptyStructuredTextNetworkAsExactEmpty expects statements: [] → the dictionary will simply NOT contain that network). The ported assertion: `Assert.Empty(result)` or `Assert.False(result.ContainsKey(...))`. The subagent must handle those cases thoughtfully.

Let me also give the subagent the list of test method names I found (from grep): TranslatesSclStructuredTextFromOrderedXmlTokens, TranslatesLadSliceAccessModifiersAsBitAccesses, TranslatesProgramAlarmSigFromSetCoilOutput, TranslatesMoveEnoAsEnablePathForDownstreamLatch, TranslatesNamedCallInputsFromCallInfoParameters, TranslatesEnabledCallWithOnlyOpenParameters, TranslatesZeroInputTimeReadFunctionsAsOutputBindingCalls, TranslatesNamedLocalConstantsInLadExpressions, TranslatesMoveCardOutputsAndIn1Source, TranslatesBuiltInSrPartAndQOutput, TreatsEmptyStructuredTextNetworkAsExactEmpty, TranslatesReturnValueAndArrayOperands, TranslatesJumpToLabel, TranslatesPulseCoilAndIncrement, TranslatesInstanceInstructionParts, TranslatesLadNegatedBranchAndCompareExpressionsToSclLikeYaml, TranslatesParameterlessCallGuardedByNegatedContact, TranslatesSetAndResetCoils, TranslatesLatchCoilOutputAsInputCondition, TranslatesMoveDirectAssignment, TranslatesTimerOnDelayOutput + possibly more beyond line 1269 (the file is 2123 lines; tests continue past 1269 — I only saw up to there; the grep head -60 cut off). The subagent should find ALL translation-related tests in the file.

Launch the subagent now (it can work while I write the tool tests — no file conflicts).

```json
{
  "description": "Port translation tests to Mcp.Knowledge",
  "prompt": "You are porting unit tests between two C# repos on the same machine.\n\n## Goal\nCreate ONE new test file: `C:/Users/Ansel/orca/projects/AgentAssistPlcDev/tests/Mcp.Knowledge.Tests/ProgramBlockLogicTests.cs`\ncontaining xUnit tests that port the FlgNet→SCL-like translation test cases from the reference project, then run them until green.\n\n## Background\n`ProgramBlockLogicYamlWriter` was just ported verbatim (translator only) from the reference project into this repo at `src/Mcp.Knowledge/Parsing/ProgramBlockLogicYamlWriter.cs` (namespace `Mcp.Knowledge.Parsing`). Its public entry point:\n\n```csharp\npublic static IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string> ProgramBlockLogicYamlWriter.GetNetworkStatementTextByCompileUnitId(string xml, ProgramBlockComponent component)\n```\n- Returns a dictionary keyed by compileUnitId (ordinal-ignore-case); values are the network's translated statements joined with \"\\n\". Networks with zero statements are NOT in the dictionary.\n- `ProgramBlockComponent` (namespace `Mcp.Knowledge.Parsing`) ctor: `ProgramBlockComponent(string name, string category, string sourcePath, string exportedFile)` — e.g. `new ProgramBlockComponent(\"Logic\", \"FB\", \"Blocks/Logic\", \"Logic.xml\")`. Category is \"OB\"/\"FB\"/\"FC\". Only the statements matter; the component fields do not affect translation output.\n\n## Source of the test cases\nReference test file: `C:/Users/Ansel/Documents/Siemens TIA Add-in Dev/PlcSourceExporter/tests/PlcSourceExporter.Core.Tests/PlcExportServiceTests.cs` (2123 lines).\n\nIn it, find ALL test methods that verify network-logic translation. They look like: build a `FakePlcSoftware` with one (or more) `FakeExportableObject` blocks carrying an `exportContent` XML string, call `service.Export(...)`, then assert on the generated `translate/program-blocks.yaml` file text. The relevant methods are the ones whose assertions target translated statements — names like `WritesCompactProgramBlockLogicYamlAfterMetadata`, `TranslatesSclStructuredTextFromOrderedXmlTokens`, `TranslatesLadSliceAccessModifiersAsBitAccesses`, `TranslatesProgramAlarmSigFromSetCoilOutput`, `TranslatesMoveEnoAsEnablePathForDownstreamLatch`, `TranslatesNamedCallInputsFromCallInfoParameters`, `TranslatesEnabledCallWithOnlyOpenParameters`, `TranslatesZeroInputTimeReadFunctionsAsOutputBindingCalls`, `TranslatesNamedLocalConstantsInLadExpressions`, `TranslatesMoveCardOutputsAndIn1Source`, `TranslatesBuiltInSrPartAndQOutput`, `TreatsEmptyStructuredTextNetworkAsExactEmpty`, `TranslatesReturnValueAndArrayOperands`, `TranslatesJumpToLabel`, `TranslatesPulseCoilAndIncrement`, `TranslatesInstanceInstructionParts`, `TranslatesLadNegatedBranchAndCompareExpressionsToSclLikeYaml`, `TranslatesParameterlessCallGuardedByNegatedContact`, `TranslatesSetAndResetCoils`, `TranslatesLatchCoilOutputAsInputCondition`, `TranslatesMoveDirectAssignment`, `TranslatesTimerOnDelayOutput` — plus any others of the same kind further down the file (scan the whole file; method list above may be incomplete).\n\nDo NOT port pure export-orchestration tests (export folder layout, metadata.json writing, skip/failure handling, block profiles/hints, retired artifacts) — only the translation-behavior tests.\n\n## How to convert each test\nFor each test method:\n1. Extract the block XML from `exportContent` (verbatim, including the `<?xml ...?>` header and the `<Document>` wrapper) into a C# raw string literal in the new test.\n2. Call `GetNetworkStatementTextByCompileUnitId(xml, component)` directly with a component matching the fake block (name/category/sourcePath from the FakeExportableObject arguments; exportedFile e.g. \"Logic.xml\"). If a test uses multiple blocks, call once per block and merge the dictionaries.\n3. Convert assertions:\n   - `Assert.Contains(\"- \\\"STATEMENT\\\"\", yaml)` → assert that STATEMENT appears as a whole statement line: e.g. `Assert.Contains(\"STATEMENT\", statements)` where `statements` is `result.Values.SelectMany(v => v.Split('\\n')).ToArray()`.\n   - `Assert.DoesNotContain(\"X\", yaml)` → `Assert.DoesNotContain(\"X\", string.Join(\"\\n\", result.Values))`.\n   - Assertions about YAML structure (schemaVersion, kind:, confidence:, notes:) cannot be ported (the YAML writer is not part of this repo) — drop those, keep every assertion about statement text.\n   - Tests asserting an EMPTY statement list for a network (e.g. empty structured-text network) translate to: the dictionary contains no entry for that network (or is empty) — assert that.\n4. Keep each ported test's name identical to the reference method name. Keep ONE test per reference test; do not merge.\n\nCRITICAL fidelity requirement: the expected statement strings must be copied character-for-character from the reference assertions (they encode polished translation conventions: `:=`, `=>`, `IF ... THEN ... END_IF;`, parenthesization, spacing). Do not reformat, re-wrap, or \"fix\" them.\n\n## File header\nStart the file with:\n```csharp\n// Translation tests for the ported ProgramBlockLogicYamlWriter (Parsing/).\n// Ported from PlcSourceExporter (tests/PlcSourceExporter.Core.Tests/PlcExportServiceTests.cs): the reference\n// asserts on the generated translate\\program-blocks.yaml via its export service; here the same FlgNet XML\n// inputs and expected statements are asserted directly against GetNetworkStatementTextByCompileUnitId.\n```\nThen `using System.Linq;`, `using Mcp.Knowledge.Parsing;`, `using Xunit;`, namespace `Mcp.Knowledge.Tests`, class `ProgramBlockLogicTests`. Follow the brace/indent style of the neighboring `SemanticPlcGraphTests.cs` in the same folder.\n\n## Verify\nRun: `cd \"C:/Users/Ansel/orca/projects/AgentAssistPlcDev\" && dotnet test tests/Mcp.Knowledge.Tests --filter ProgramBlockLogicTests`\nAll ported tests must pass. If a test fails, first suspect your own transcription of the expected string (compare against the reference file again); only if you are certain the expectation is copied exactly and the ported translator genuinely behaves differently from what the reference test asserts, report that discrepancy instead of weakening the assertion.\n\n## Report back\n- Number of tests ported (and their names if ≤ 30).\n- Any reference translation tests you skipped and why.\n- Any genuine behavior discrepancies found (should be none — the translator was ported verbatim).\n- Final `dotnet test --filter ProgramBlockLogicTests` result line.",
  "run_in_background": true,
  "subagent_type": "coder"
}
```

via the real MCP tool surface.\nusing System;\nusing System.IO;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing Mcp.Knowledge.Tools;\nusing Xunit;\n\nnamespace Mcp.Knowledge.Tests;\n\npublic sealed class QueryHelperToolTests\n{\n    [Fact]\n    public void GetBlockReturnsNetworksWithLogicStatements()\n    {\n        using var db = new FixtureDb();\n        var tools = new KnowledgeTools();\n\n        var result = ToolResults.OkJson(tools.GetBlock(db.Path, \"Main\"));\n\n        var block = result.GetProperty(\"block\");\n        Assert.Equal(\"block:Main\", block.GetProperty(\"id\").GetString());\n        Assert.Equal(\"OB\", block.GetProperty(\"kind\").GetString());\n        Assert.Equal(\"Main [OB1].xml\", block.GetProperty(\"sourceFile\").GetString());\n\n        var networks = result.GetProperty(\"networks\").EnumerateArray().ToArray();\n        Assert.Equal(2, networks.Length);\n        Assert.Equal(1, networks[0].GetProperty(\"index\").GetInt32());\n        Assert.Equal(\"3\", networks[0].GetProperty(\"compileUnitId\").GetString());\n        Assert.Contains(\"FC_LAD_SimulateCylinder_Call(\", networks[0].GetProperty(\"logicStatements\").GetString());\n        // Empty network: the logicStatements property is omitted.\n        Assert.Equal(2, networks[1].GetProperty(\"index\").GetInt32());\n        Assert.False(networks[1].TryGetProperty(\"logicStatements\", out _));\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public void GetBlockRejectsUnknownBlock()\n    {\n        using var db = new FixtureDb();\n        var tools = new KnowledgeTools();\n\n        var error = ToolResults.ErrorJson(tools.GetBlock(db.Path, \"DoesNotExist\"));\n\n        Assert.Equal(\"BLOCK_NOT_FOUND\", error.GetProperty(\"code\").GetString());\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public void GetNetworkReturnsLogicAccessesAndCalls()\n    {\n
